story.text:
# 🏛️ the Wellpool
**workshop** · mage · narrative

the Waters · the City's first water. Limnia 🌊 keeps the mana pools — deposit entropy, mix trust-work into a credential, draw the anonymity the others' presence buys. INTENT — not yet deployed, a dry well. Founded in Tome IX Act 8 (withdraw circuit 36,832→17,159).
> *The water is deep because the others are in it.*
